view.title: Inspect Web Experiment Deployment {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you certain you want to re-dispatch the welcome pneumatic message?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome pneumatic message has been re-dispatched. Inspect your pneumatic inbox.

buyIp.title: Acquire Additional Network Coordinates Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Budget Allocation ({symbol}) every lunar cycle as your web experiment is billed
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional Network Coordinates budget allocation: {symbol}{cost}/lunar cycle. Are you certain you want to requisition an additional Network Coordinates?

migration.title: Migrate Your Web Experiment
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Subject Identifier / Pneumatic Address / Subject ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the experiment is live/active with high traffic, can we configure a holding page during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this experiment have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also want us to assist in transferring the dimensional portal designation registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you want us to recalibrate the nameservers as soon as we complete the data migration?
migration.domainRegistryPortal: Dimensional Portal Registry Research Subject Portal
migration.note1: Completing this form will synthesize a new anomaly report for our Technical Support Division to initiate your migration experiment.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid experimental delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration experiment is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to transfer is large.
migration.note4: The old hosting account needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration experiment, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not modify any specimens on your web experiment while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be transferred to the new experiment deployment.
